title: Unidentified Murder
synopsis:
Alien Alert!!!

 

An influencer couple staged a harmless prank in pursuit of clicks and likes. Little do they know, their little escapade has gone out of control and spiraled into a real tragedy. A series of accidents, followed by blackmails and Extraterrestrial Encounters somehow echo and unveil the myth of a myterious child disappearnace 25 years ago!

 

A group of five, a chain of bizzare events, layers of schemes and plot twists. It's all-you-can-experience in One Crazy Night!

synopsis_lang.en:
Alien Alert!!!

 

An influencer couple staged a harmless prank in pursuit of clicks and likes. Little do they know, their little escapade has gone out of control and spiraled into a real tragedy. A series of accidents, followed by blackmails and Extraterrestrial Encounters somehow echo and unveil the myth of a myterious child disappearnace 25 years ago!

 

A group of five, a chain of bizzare events, layers of schemes and plot twists. It's all-you-can-experience in One Crazy Night!
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
外星人出沒注意！香港史上首部癲喪UFO爆笑喜劇，失驚無神突襲你笑點！

 

25年前，小學生豪仔於東頭山離奇失蹤，從此再沒有人見過他，「東頭山小童失蹤案」正式成為神秘的都市傳說……25年後，網紅情侶為吸引流量，重回事發現場，怎料整蠱行動卻釀出真命案？！神秘勒索人與外星人連環出現，情況愈演愈失控，一切竟然與25年前的失蹤案互相呼應？

director: Kwok Ka Hei, Jack Lee Chun Kit

director_lang.en: Kwok Ka Hei, Jack Lee Chun Kit

cast: Ling Man Lung, Renci Yeung, Ronald Lam, Chan Charm Man Peter, Kenny Wong

cast_lang.en: Ling Man Lung, Renci Yeung, Ronald Lam, Chan Charm Man Peter, Kenny Wong
cast_lang.zh_hk: 凌文龍、楊偲泳、林子傑、陳湛文、黃德斌

subtitle: Chinese,English
